overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing two characters, a teenage girl with a crossbow and a young boy, walking through a Mediterranean-style historic palace garden. They traverse cobblestone paths, pass a lily pond, walk through a shaded stone colonnade, and emerge to a scenic coastal viewpoint overlooking the sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree garden path approaching courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone garden path while holding the child's hand, approaching the stone building ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the garden path with dense fronds
irregular cobblestone paving stones forming the walkway
two-story stone building with arched openings and weathered walls
tall rocky mountain face rising behind the garden

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sun-drenched Mediterranean garden with tall palm trees lining a cobblestone path. The two characters walk forward toward a historic stone building visible in the distance, with a dramatic mountain cliff rising to the right. The space is open and tranquil, with no other people present.

events.description: entering the courtyard with the rectangular lily pond surrounded by stone walkways

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the lily pond, holding the child's hand while moving past the water feature

entered.detail: rectangular reflecting pool with green water and lily pads
pink and white water lily flowers floating on the pond surface
row of stone arches forming the ground floor of the building

segments.scene_description: The characters enter a serene courtyard dominated by a rectangular lily pond filled with blooming water lilies. They walk along the cobblestone edge of the pond, passing under the shade of the building's arches on the left. The historic stone building now looms larger as they approach, with the mountain still visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden terrace with flower beds and stone benches

events.description: turning away from the pond to follow the upper garden path lined with flowers

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated garden path, passing stone benches and flower beds while heading toward the colonnade

entered.detail: low stone seating walls along the right side of the path
raised garden beds with red and white flowering plants

segments.scene_description: Leaving the pond behind, the characters ascend to a garden terrace lined with stone benches and colorful flower beds. The path continues toward a shaded colonnade entrance visible ahead. The historic building now runs parallel on the left, while the mountain cliff remains prominent in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone colonnade with arches and columns

events.description: entering the shaded colonnade with repeating stone arches and columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway, passing between stone columns while holding the child's hand

entered.detail: series of rounded stone arches forming the covered walkway
thick cylindrical stone pillars supporting the arches
circular stone fountain basin in the center of the colonnade

segments.scene_description: The characters enter a shaded colonnade with repeating stone arches and thick columns that block most of the sky. They walk past a central stone fountain as they traverse the enclosed walkway. The lighting shifts to dappled shadows, and the open garden views are temporarily replaced by stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal viewpoint with purple flowering bushes overlooking the sea

events.description: exiting the colonnade to the open coastal viewpoint with the sea visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the coastal overlook, approaching the viewpoint with the sea and distant towers visible ahead

entered.detail: elevated viewpoint with low stone wall overlooking the coastline
dense bougainvillea with vibrant purple flowers lining the path
blue Mediterranean sea visible on the horizon beyond the coastal town
stone towers and buildings of the coastal town in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the colonnade, the scene opens dramatically to a coastal viewpoint with the sea visible in the distance. The characters walk past vibrant purple flowering bushes toward the overlook, with the sun backlighting a palm tree on the right. The historic building falls behind to the left as they approach the scenic vista of the distant coastline and towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched Mediterranean palace garden that gradually transitions from open courtyards into a shaded colonnade before opening onto a coastal vista. It begins on a cobblestone path lined with palm trees, moving toward a historic stone building with a dramatic mountain cliff rising in the distance. As the characters progress, the scene shifts into a serene courtyard featuring a rectangular lily pond and arched walkways, before ascending to a garden terrace filled with colorful flower beds and stone benches. The camera then follows them into the dappled shadows of a colonnade, where repeating stone arches and a central fountain temporarily enclose the view. Finally, the scene opens dramatically as they emerge from the shade, passing vibrant purple bushes toward a scenic overlook of the distant sea and coastline.
